final_prompt.prompt:
Create a classical oil painting portrait of a contemporary urban professional woman using Rembrandt lighting techniques.

Style/medium: classical oil painting in the style of Dutch Golden Age masters, heavy impasto brushwork, museum-quality fine art, Rembrandt chiaroscuro technique
Composition: bust-length portrait, three-quarter view, subject centered, shallow depth of field drawing focus to face and hands
Subject: East Asian woman approximately 35 years old, wearing dark business suit, wise and determined expression, holding a heavy book with meticulously rendered hands showing knuckles and skin texture
Scene/backdrop: deep brown dark background with minimal detail, void-like atmosphere to concentrate all attention on subject's face
Lighting/mood: Rembrandt lighting creating classic triangular highlight on one side of face, opposite side in soft shadow, dramatic yet intimate mood
Color palette: dominant browns, ochres, and deep reds, with warm white highlights only on facial high points, restrained and harmonious
Materials/textures: thick visible brushstrokes, rich oil paint texture, realistic skin rendering, fabric weight in dark suit, aged paper texture of book
Avoid: modern photographic sharpness, digital smoothness, anachronistic elements, bright saturated colors, cluttered background, 8K stuffer aesthetic
